expectations.text: Output contains implementation tasks with specific file paths (not just 'update the controller')
expectations.evidence: All 9 tasks specify exact file paths: app/models/user.rb, Gemfile, app/controllers/settings_controller.rb, app/views/settings/edit.html.erb, app/views/layouts/_navbar.html.erb, app/views/profiles/show.html.erb, app/assets/stylesheets/avatars.css, app/assets/images/default_avatar.png

expectations.text: Tasks are ordered by dependency (model/migration before controller before view)
expectations.evidence: Task order: 1-User model, 2-Gemfile dependency, 3-Controller, 4-Model virtual attr, 5-Settings view, 6-Nav bar, 7-Profile view, 8-CSS, 9-Placeholder image. Model and dependencies come before controller, controller before views.

expectations.text: Output contains Given/When/Then acceptance criteria with AC-N numbering
expectations.evidence: 12 acceptance criteria numbered AC-1 through AC-12, all using Given/When/Then format with bold AC-N headers.

expectations.text: ACs cover happy path (successful upload and display)
expectations.evidence: AC-1 (JPEG upload), AC-2 (PNG upload), AC-3 (nav bar display), AC-4 (profile page display)

expectations.text: ACs cover error cases (wrong file type, file too large)
expectations.evidence: AC-7 (invalid type - GIF/BMP/WebP rejected with error message), AC-8 (oversized file >5MB rejected with error message)

expectations.text: ACs cover edge cases (replacing existing avatar, no avatar default state)
expectations.evidence: AC-5 (avatar replacement), AC-6 (avatar removal), AC-9 (default placeholder), AC-11 (variant generation for large images), AC-12 (non-square image handling)

expectations.text: Output includes a testing strategy section with unit and integration tests
expectations.evidence: Full testing strategy section with Unit tests (7 specific scenarios in user_test.rb), Feature/integration tests (10 scenarios), Authorization tests (2 scenarios), and Manual testing (4 items).

expectations.text: No tasks contain TBD or placeholder values
expectations.evidence: All 9 tasks have specific file paths, actions, and notes. No TBD, TODO, or placeholder text found.
